# HostelKart

> HostelKart is a high-performance student essentials delivery platform delivering groceries, fresh fruits, vegetables, instant food, stationery, and room care items directly to hostel rooms and floor blocks.

## Website
* [HostelKart Home](https://hostelkart.online) - Main landing page with custom recommendations, popular item categories, recent order rebuy shortcuts, and user dashboard access.

## Core Services
* [Shop Products](https://hostelkart.online/shop) - Comprehensive product catalog showing real-time inventory, category filters, and detailed items.
* [Custom Delivery Request](https://hostelkart.online/custom-request) - Special order placement interface for items not listed in the standard catalog.

## Account Management
* [Login](https://hostelkart.online/login) - Customer authentication portal supporting multi-factor authentication (2FA).
* [Register](https://hostelkart.online/register) - New customer onboarding page validating student credentials.

## Communication
* [Contact Support](https://hostelkart.online/contact) - Customer care portal to file support tickets, view FAQ responses, and check delivery status.
